review_comments:
It was Resurrection Day(Easter Sunday) eve and I had to look sharp and refined for the special service at my church. However, being occupied all of Saturday, I had to squeeze in a salon visit late at night, at 8:25 PM. My experience revealed the stark difference in customer service between two branches of Naturals Salon.

First, I headed to the Kothanur branch, hoping for a quick haircut and beard grooming. Despite the barber's willingness to take my appointment, the manager declined the service, citing it was closing time. This refusal came after making me wait for 10 minutes—a disappointing experience that left me feeling overlooked.

On the other hand, the Hennur branch demonstrated exceptional customer service and humanity. Despite my 30-minute delay (due to aiding an elderly woman who fell while crossing the road), they graciously held my appointment. Their warmth and humility were touching, and I was welcomed by the stylist, ASIF. He listened to my story and didn’t show even the slightest frustration about working late. His kindness and professionalism stood out as he diligently completed the haircut and beard trim.

Both ASIF and the branch manager, TRESA, deserve commendation for prioritizing customer needs. Their actions reflect what outstanding service should be.

In my experience, the Hennur branch of Naturals Salon truly excels in delivering exceptional service with a personal touch. They have earned my trust and appreciation, and I wholeheartedly recommend them!
response: Thanks for choosing us and leaving a review Shiva Kumar M. Our team will be thrilled to hear this. We look forward to your next visit. Thank you!

review_comments:
Been going to Arif for a while now — started at the Ayyapa Nagar branch near Lulu's (which unfortunately closed) and have followed up with him since. Must've done 4–5 sessions with him across haircut, beard shaping, and face care, and the consistency has been great every single time.

Arif knows what he's doing. The haircut is always clean, the beard shaping is precise, and the detan actually shows visible results. No rushing, no guesswork — he listens, understands what you want, and delivers.

Beyond the skill, he's just genuinely pleasant to interact with. Professional, calm, and the kind of person who makes the whole experience comfortable.

If you're at Naturals and Arif is available, just go with him. You won't need a second opinion. 👍

We are thrilled to hear about your positive experiences with Arif, especially regarding his precision haircuts and professional demeanor.
